reason: Size comparison reads dramatically: Zara towers at full new muscle mass with Mia beside her reaching only Zara's chest height, both on the same cracked-floor plane. Low-hero angle holds (lamp/ceiling high in frame, Zara looming), both identities match the banked sheets, and expressions land (Zara radiant triumphant grin, Mia awed disbelief looking up). Hard rules pass: photoreal DAZ3D, no baked text, chest/hips fully covered, four hands and no extra limbs, only the two cast in the lamp-lit cracked living room; minor pose deviation (hands on hips vs fists at sides) is non-reject-level.
